text:
and Tula.
Though these are the Exaltation houses, yet there is a particular
degree in them which is termed the Highest Exaltation point.
So for the seven planets beginning with the Sun the degrees of
highest exaltation are in order the 10th, 3rd, 28th, 15th, 5th,
27th and 20th in their respective exaltation Rasis. So you
can call the Sun really Exalted if he is in the 10th degree of
Mesa. If on the other hand he be in the 20th degree of the same
sign, you could only say that he is in his exaltation sign but
not in his highest exaltation, as he has fallen from that point.
As night follows day, there must be a Rasi where a planet is
debilitated, Nica, also. Yes. The house 7th from the exaltation
Rasi is called the Debilitation Sign of a planet. So what is
the Nica Rail for the Sun ? It must be Tula as it is the 7th
from Mesa. In the same manner you can easily find out the
Nica houses for the other planets. They are in order Vrscika,
Karkataka, Mina, Makara, Kanya and Mesa.
